name: Oriental Steamed Fish
recipeIngredient: 4 White fish steaks, about 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fish in a single layer on an oiled rack of bamboo steamer.
2. Sprinkle ginger evenly over the fish.
3. Set the rack in a large pot or wok filled with boiling water (ensure water level does not reach the fish).
4. Cover and steam for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
5. Meanwhile, combine orange juice, soy sauce, vinegar, and brown sugar in a small saucepan; bring to boil.
6. Remove from heat; stir in sesame oil.
7. Arrange fish on serving platter; sprinkle green onions over fish and pour sauce over all.
Serves: 4
